traits.name: Shadow Blend (bonus)
traits.text: While in dim light or darkness, the shadow mastiff becomes invisible, along with anything it is wearing or carrying. The invisibility lasts until the shadow mastiff uses a bonus action to end it or until the shadow mastiff attacks, is in bright light, or is incapacitated.

traits.name: Ethereal Awareness
traits.text: The shadow mastiff can see ethereal creatures and objects.

traits.name: Sunlight Weakness
traits.text: While in bright light created by sunlight, the shadow mastiff has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.
